title: Strikethrough on completed items on Main Table
excerpt: Hello, I would like the status “done” on an item also strike through the item so that when I’m scanning my list of items I can easily identify which are still active. I do not wish to hide the completed tasks because I f…

posts.author: ornlbinder-jet (Dr. Amy Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I would like the status “done” on an item also strike through the item so that when I’m scanning my list of items I can easily identify which are still active. I do not wish to hide the completed tasks because I frequently reference the information in those as I’m completing other tasks.

posts.author: DigitalVendettaProd (McKenzie Patton)
posts.cookedHtml: It is really shocking that this hasn’t been created yet. Would be very helpful for my views.
